faq.title: FAQ
faq.subtitle: Quick answers — buying, renewing, trial, and what to do if something goes wrong.

howToBuy.q: How do I buy whitelist access?
howToBuy.a: Open the Shop, pick a game, choose a plan (e.g. 30 days / Lifetime), type your Roblox username, then pay with PromptPay (Thai QR) or card. Your whitelist activates immediately after payment.

paymentMethods.a: PromptPay (no fee) and Visa / Mastercard. Card payments have a small surcharge that's shown before you confirm.

findUsername.q: Where do I find my Roblox username?
findUsername.a: Open Roblox → tap the profile icon → your @username is right under your display name. The username (not display name) is what we use for whitelist.

wrongUsername.q: I typed my username wrong — what now?
wrongUsername.a: If you already paid to the wrong account, contact us on Discord with your Stripe receipt — we can transfer it.

howToRenew.a: Buy the same plan again with the same Roblox username. We extend your whitelist from your current expiry (so you don't lose days for renewing early). If your access already expired, the new plan starts from today.

checkExpiry.q: How do I check when my access expires?
checkExpiry.a: Use the Check page — just type your Roblox username. You'll see your status (active / expired) and the exact expiry date.

trialHow.q: How does the free trial work?
trialHow.a: On any product with trial enabled, click the dashed "Try free X minutes" button. We grant whitelist access immediately for the given duration — no payment, no card. After the trial ends, just buy a plan to keep going.

trialLimit.a: Trials are limited to 1 per Roblox username per 24 hours, per product. This prevents abuse so trial mode stays available.

support.a: Join our Discord (link in the navbar). We're fastest there. Include your Roblox username and Stripe receipt when asking about an order.

faq.ctaBody: Join our Discord — fastest support, plus updates on new games.

errorPage.title: Whoops!
